.file-embed.background: rgb(239, 238, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-files-container .tree-item.background: rgb(209, 213, 230) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(205, 210, 228) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(219, 237, 240) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
blockquote.box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.01) 0px 2px 4px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.01) 0px 4px 8px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.01) 0px 4px 8px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.01) 0px 0px 12px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.01) 0px 2px 16px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.01) 0px 4px 20px 0px

div.callout-content.background: rgba(20, 120, 200, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgba(50, 100, 140, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(255, 74, 74, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(72, 122, 33, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(255, 74, 74, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(10, 220, 0, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(20, 120, 200, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(255, 0, 183, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(0, 100, 255, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(137, 68, 198, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(210, 100, 100, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(40, 150, 15, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(244, 138, 74, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.075) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(205, 210, 228) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(205, 210, 228) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(125, 146, 232, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h1[data-heading=\"This is a heading 1\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(to right, rgba(125, 146, 232, 0.3), rgba(125, 146, 232, 0.5), rgba(125, 146, 232, 0.5) 95%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.background: rgb(236, 236, 249) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.workspace-leaf-resize-handle.background: rgb(236, 236, 249) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(239, 238, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(232, 230, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(239, 238, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(239, 238, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

table.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box padding-box

td.background: rgb(236, 236, 249) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

th.background: rgb(219, 237, 240) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
